subject: FW: Vendor Proposal - Pinnacle Analytics
content:
Olivia —

perspective on the Legacy CRM changes. In the meantime, I've created a
shared doc where we can track the open items:

https://docs.google.com/d/6c4b761a28b734fe

- DataFlow Systems contract review (owner: Olivia)
- Observability Stack documentation (owner: Karen)

Please add any additional concerns there. I'll consolidate everything before
our Monday sync.

Thanks,
Olivia

subject: FW: Vendor Proposal - Pinnacle Analytics
content:
Team,

Effective Wednesday, we're updating the Remote Work policy. Key changes:

1. Sales approval is now required for any Analytics Pipeline changes in
production (previously only staging required approval)
2. All PRs affecting Aurora must include security review
3. EMEA deployments will follow a new rolling strategy
4. Incident response SLA updated: P1 = 12min, P2 = 40min

Full policy doc: https://wiki.internal/policies/0c3e9f38af

Please review by EOD Friday and flag any concerns to Alice.

Thanks,
Olivia

Best,
Olivia Lewis
Director of Engineering, Finance
Initech
